title: psychotria calva var. longistipulata
intro: Psychotria calva var. longistipulata is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Psychotria genus, which consists of tropical plants commonly known as wild coffee or Joe Pye weed. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Psychotria calva var. longistipulata include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and potentially treat various health conditions.
